2604.01168.title: S0 Tuning: Zero-Overhead Adaptation of Hybrid Recurrent-Attention Models
2604.01168.paper_summary: Using roughly 48 execution-verified HumanEval training solutions, tuning a single initial state matrix per recurrent layer, with zero inference overhead, outperforms LoRA by +10.8 pp (p < 0.001) on HumanEval. The method, which we call S0 tuning, optimizes one state matrix per recurrent layer while freezing all model weights. On Qwen3.5-4B (GatedDeltaNet hybrid), S0 tuning improves greedy pass@1 by +23.6 +/- 1.7 pp (10 seeds). On FalconH1-7B (Mamba-2 hybrid), S0 reaches 71.8% +/- 1.3 and LoRA reaches 71.4% +/- 2.4 (3 seeds), statistically indistinguishable at this sample size while requiring no weight merging. Cross-domain transfer is significant on MATH-500 (+4.8 pp, p = 0.00002, 8 seeds) and GSM8K (+2.8 pp, p = 0.0003, 10 seeds); a text-to-SQL benchmark (Spider) shows no transfer, consistent with the trajectory-steering mechanism. A prefix-tuning control on a pure Transformer (Qwen2.5-3B) degrades performance by -13.9 pp under all nine configurations tested. On Qwen3.5, a per-step state-offset variant reaches +27.1 pp, above both S0 and LoRA but with per-step inference cost. Taken together, the results show that recurrent state initialization is a strong zero-inference-overhead PEFT surface for hybrid language models when verified supervision is scarce. The tuned state is a ~48 MB file; task switching requires no weight merging or model reload. Code and library: https://github.com/jackyoung27/s0-tuning.
2604.01168.paper_summary_zh: 使用約48個執行驗證的HumanEval訓練解決方案，對每個遞迴層調整一個初始狀態矩陣，且無推理開銷，在HumanEval上超越LoRA達+10.8個百分點（p < 0.001）。我們稱之為S0調整的方法，優化每個遞迴層的一個狀態矩陣，同時凍結所有模型權重。在Qwen3.5-4B（GatedDeltaNet混合）上，S0調整使得greedy pass@1提高了+23.6 +/- 1.7個百分點（10個種子）。在FalconH1-7B（Mamba-2混合）上，S0達到71.8% +/- 1.3，而LoRA達到71.4% +/- 2.4（3個種子），在這個樣本大小下統計上無法區分，且不需要權重合併。跨領域轉移在MATH-500上顯著（+4.8個百分點，p = 0.00002，8個種子）和GSM8K（+2.8個百分點，p = 0.0003，10個種子）；一個文本到SQL基準（Spider）顯示沒有轉移，與軌跡引導機制一致。在純Transformer（Qwen2.5-3B）上的前綴調整控制在所有九個測試配置下性能下降了-13.9個百分點。在Qwen3.5上，一個每步狀態偏移變體達到+27.1個百分點，超過S0和LoRA，但有每步推理成本。綜合來看，結果顯示遞迴狀態初始化是一個強大的零推理開銷PEFT表面，適用於當驗證監督稀缺的混合語言模型。調整後的狀態是一個約48 MB的文件；任務切換不需要權重合併或模型重新加載。代碼和庫：https://github.com/jackyoung27/s0-tuning。
2604.01168.author: Jack Young et.al.
